Trump’s allies have chosen her anyway  The GuardianCongress sends letter to WNBA regarding fouls against Caitlin Clark  NBC 5 Chicago“They Should Be Kissing The Ground She Walks On”: Phoenix Fans Side With Caitlin Clark In Long-Drawn Saga Against Alyssa Thomas  Yahoo SportsIn letter, lawmakers seek 'accountability' from WNBA on Clark  ESPN
